title: feat: Allow full constant wrapping for hilomap
body:
_What are the reasons/motivation for this change?_
There is no way to wrap the whole constant cell at once (based on my understanding). This is normally an unusual requirement for FPGA, but for a coarser grain device, bit level constant setting might not be available. 

_Explain how this is achieved._
By adding a new option to the `hilomap` which allows it to wrap a full constant by a cell. The original value will be stored into a parameter of the new cell, which is user-specified. 

_If applicable, please suggest to reviewers how they can test the change._
Example module:
```verilog
module test();

  wire [31:0] in;
  wire [31:0] out;
  assign out = in + 16;

endmodule
```
Testing: `yosys -p "read_verilog test.v; hierarchy -auto-top; hilomap -wrap const O val; show"`
